title: Service of jury commission process; general rule
doc_html:
§115.  Service of jury commission process; general rule

Unless otherwise provided by law, a subpoena, notice, process, order or document issued by a jury commission shall be served by the sheriff.  

Acts 1966, No. 311, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1967.
